title: Justice Department Drops Proposed Fund

source.title: Justice Department scraps Trump's 'anti-weaponization fund' after pushback from Congress

segments.title: Plans Are Scrapped
segments.audioText: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said today that the Justice Department is scrapping plans to create that $1.8 billion so-called anti-weaponization fund.
segments.transcript: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said today that the Justice Department is scrapping plans to create that $1.8 billion so-called anti-weaponization fund.
segments.translationZh: 署理司法部長 Todd Blanche 今日話，司法部正取消建立嗰個所謂 18 億美元「反武器化基金」嘅計劃。

points.label: Acting Attorney General
points.explanationZh: Acting 指署理、暫任；呢個頭銜通常會連住聽成一組。

points.label: is scrapping plans
points.explanationZh: scrap plans 即取消計劃；新聞入面好常用 scrap 表示放棄原本方案。

points.label: so-called
points.explanationZh: so-called 表示『所謂嘅』，暗示呢個名稱係別人畀嘅，講者保持距離。

segments.title: A Clear Statement
segments.audioText: We have just been getting this in the last couple hours from acting Attorney General Blanche himself, and it is the most clear statement that we or Congress has gotten about the future of the fund.
segments.transcript: We have just been getting this in the last couple hours from acting Attorney General Blanche himself, and it is the most clear statement that we or Congress has gotten about the future of the fund.
segments.translationZh: 我哋喺過去幾個鐘先啱啱由署理司法部長 Blanche 本人得到呢個消息，而呢個係我哋或者國會至今得到、關於呢個基金未來最清楚嘅講法。

points.label: in the last couple hours
points.explanationZh: couple hours 係『幾個鐘』；聽新聞時可以當時間背景先抓住。

points.label: from Blanche himself
points.explanationZh: himself 強調消息來自本人，唔係間接傳聞。

points.label: the future of the fund
points.explanationZh: future of... 指某件事之後會點發展；基金、計劃、公司都可以用。

segments.title: No Money Disbursed
segments.audioText: Senate Republican sources tell me their understanding from the White House is that no money will be disbursed from this.
segments.transcript: Senate Republican sources tell me their understanding from the White House is that no money will be disbursed from this.
segments.translationZh: 參議院共和黨消息人士話畀我知，佢哋從白宮得到嘅理解係，唔會有任何款項由呢度發放出去。

points.label: sources tell me
points.explanationZh: 新聞記者常用 sources tell me，表示資料來自消息人士。

points.label: their understanding
points.explanationZh: understanding 呢度係『佢哋理解到嘅情況』，唔係學習能力。

points.label: will be disbursed
points.explanationZh: disburse 係正式講法，意思係發放款項；被動式 will be disbursed 要留意 be。

segments.title: Questions Remain
segments.audioText: But, of course, this doesn't really answer all the questions we have.
segments.transcript: But, of course, this doesn't really answer all the questions we have.
segments.translationZh: 不過，當然，呢個其實未真正回答晒我哋所有問題。

points.label: But, of course
points.explanationZh: But, of course 係轉折加補充，語氣自然，唔係硬生生反駁。

points.label: doesn't really answer
points.explanationZh: doesn't really 比 doesn't answer 柔和少少，意思係『未算真正回答』。

points.label: all the questions we have
points.explanationZh: we have 放喺 questions 後面，等於『我哋有嘅問題』。

segments.title: Watching for Next Steps
segments.audioText: And that's important because there are other major bills ahead, including on intelligence, that the Senate needs to deal with in the next week or so.
segments.transcript: And that's important because there are other major bills ahead, including on intelligence, that the Senate needs to deal with in the next week or so.
segments.translationZh: 呢點重要，因為之後仲有其他大型法案要處理，包括情報相關法案，參議院需要喺未來大約一星期處理。

points.label: that's important because
points.explanationZh: 好實用嘅解釋句式：先講重要，再用 because 交代理由。

points.label: major bills ahead
points.explanationZh: bills 係法案；ahead 表示之後仲有嘢等住處理。

points.label: in the next week or so
points.explanationZh: or so 表示大約，令時間講法自然啲，唔使太死實。

sentences: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said today that the Justice Department is scrapping plans to create that $1.8 billion so-called anti-weaponization fund.
We have just been getting this in the last couple hours from acting Attorney General Blanche himself, and it is the most clear statement that we or Congress has gotten about the future of the fund.
Senate Republican sources tell me their understanding from the White House is that no money will be disbursed from this.
But, of course, this doesn't really answer all the questions we have.
And that's important because there are other major bills ahead, including on intelligence, that the Senate needs to deal with in the next week or so.

vocabulary.example: The agency is scrapping plans for the new fund.
vocabulary.translationZh: 該機構正取消新基金嘅計劃。

vocabulary.example: The future of the fund is still unclear.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個基金嘅未來仍然唔清楚。

vocabulary.example: It was the clearest statement so far.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個係到目前為止最清楚嘅聲明。

vocabulary.example: Congress still has questions about the plan.
vocabulary.translationZh: 國會對呢個計劃仍然有問題。

vocabulary.example: No money will be disbursed from this.
vocabulary.translationZh: 唔會有任何款項由呢度發放出去。
有啲議員仍然抱懷疑態度。

vocabulary.example: There are other major bills ahead.
vocabulary.translationZh: 之後仲有其他大型法案。

phrases.example: The Justice Department is scrapping plans to create the fund.

phrases.meaningZh: 呢個基金嘅未來／之後會點
phrases.example: Congress has questions about the future of the fund.
Sources said no money will be disbursed.
This doesn't really answer all the questions we have.

phrases.phrase: in the next week or so
phrases.example: The Senate needs to deal with it in the next week or so.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:08 跟讀第一句，特別聽 scrapping plans to create 呢段連音。
重播 01:31，先寫低 no money will be disbursed，再補返前面 sources tell me。
模仿 02:21：But, of course, this doesn't really answer...，換成你自己想講嘅問題。
用兩句英文複述：The Justice Department is dropping the fund. Lawmakers still have questions about what comes next.

notes: 今日重點係聽正式新聞入面點樣講『取消計劃』同『仍有疑問』，句子唔使改寫，直接練原句。
先用時間碼盲聽一次，再對照 PBS transcript；每次只聽一個 chunk，唔好一次追晒成句。
第三句有被動式 will be disbursed，聽到 be 要留意後面係過去分詞。
dailyLifePractice 會轉去輕鬆啲嘅日常情境：改計劃、問清楚同解釋延誤。

dailyLifePractice.title: Changing a Plan
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你同朋友本來約好，但要自然咁改計劃，語氣要清楚又唔失禮。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Can we tweak the plan a little? Something came up this morning. I can still make it, but I may be about fifteen minutes late.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Can we tweak the plan a little?
lines.zh: 我哋可唔可以少少改一改個計劃？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I can still make it, but I may be about fifteen minutes late.
lines.zh: 我仍然嚟到，不過可能會遲大約十五分鐘。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: tweak the plan 比 change the plan 柔和，聽落似小調整。Something came up 係美國日常好常用，唔需要即刻講晒所有細節。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 fifteen minutes 換成 ten minutes、half an hour 或 a little bit。
drills.example: I may be about ten minutes late.

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Something came up this morning 三次，練 came up 連住講。

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking the Details
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你收到一個安排，但有啲位未清楚，要禮貌咁問多一句。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Just to make sure I understand, are we meeting at the front desk or by the elevators? I don't want to go to the wrong spot.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Just to make sure I understand, are we meeting at the front desk or by the elevators?
lines.zh: 我想確認自己冇理解錯，我哋係前台見，定係電梯旁邊見？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Got it. I don't want to go to the wrong spot.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Just to make sure I understand 係好自然嘅確認句，語氣比 What do you mean? 客氣好多，工作同日常都啱用。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 Just to make sure I understand 開頭，問清楚時間、地點或付款方式。
drills.example: Just to make sure I understand, are we meeting at two or two-thirty?

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 聽到對方回答後，用 Got it 加一句原因。
drills.example: Got it. I don't want to miss the start.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你要同店員或同事解釋一件事未完成，講法簡短、負責任。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Sorry for the delay. We're still waiting on one more piece of information. I should have an update for you later today.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: We're still waiting on one more piece of information.
lines.zh: 我哋仲等緊多一項資料。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I should have an update for you later today.
lines.zh: 我今日晏啲應該可以畀你更新。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: waiting on 喺美式口語入面好常見，意思係等緊某人或某樣資料。I should have... 比 I will have... 留有少少彈性。

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 We're still waiting on... 講一個你等緊嘅嘢。
drills.example: We're still waiting on the receipt.

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 你先講 Sorry for the delay，再用 I should have an update... 結尾。
drills.example: Sorry for the delay. I should have an update for you this afternoon.
